Name: Percentage of 'Completed + Closed' that occur after exactly one 'Completed + Resolved' without intermediate waiting states
Metric: Percentage of 'Completed + Closed' out of all 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Frequency of variants where 'Completed + Closed' is immediately preceded by 'Completed + Resolved'
Metric: Number of 'Completed + Closed' activities for cases where activity 'Completed + Resolved' occurs

Name: Percentage of 'Completed + Closed' executions relative to the total number of 'Completed + Resolved' executions
Metric: Percentage of 'Completed + Closed' out of all 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Frequency of 'Completed + Closed' in variants that include any 'Accepted + Wait' activity (e.g., 'Accepted + Wait - User', 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor', etc.)
Metric: Number of 'Completed + Closed' activities for cases where activity 'Accepted + Wait' occurs

Name: Percentage of cases containing 'Completed + In Call' that do not result in 'Completed + Closed'
Metric: Percentage of 'Completed + In Call' out of all cases where 'Completed + Closed' does not happen

Name: Frequency of 'Completed + Closed' in cases that never include 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: Number of 'Completed + Closed' activities for cases where activity 'Completed + In Call' does not occur

Name: Percentage of 'Completed + Closed' among all terminal activities (i.e., compared to 'Completed + In Call', 'Completed + Cancelled')
Metric: Percentage of 'Completed + Closed' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of 'Completed + Closed' grouped by product type (e.g., PROD582, PROD424, etc.)
Metric: Number of 'Completed + Closed' activities grouped by the last value of product

Name: Percentage of variants ending in 'Completed + Closed' versus those ending in 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: Percentage of 'Completed + Closed' out of all 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Frequency of 'Completed + Closed' occurring within 24 hours after 'Completed + Resolved'
Metric: Number of 'Completed + Closed' activities for cases where activity 'Completed + Resolved' occurs

Name: Percentage of 'Completed + Closed' executions performed by resources who also executed 'Completed + In Call' in other cases
Metric: Percentage of 'Completed + Closed' out of all 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Frequency of 'Completed + Closed' in high-impact incidents (impact = 'High') compared to low or medium impact
Metric: Number of 'Completed + Closed' activities == 'High' where ma is the last value of impact

Name: Percentage of process instances that reach 'Completed + Closed' without ever entering a 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' state after the initial activity
Metric: Percentage of 'Completed + Closed' out of all cases where 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' does not happen

Name: Frequency of 'Completed + Closed' in variants that contain more than two repetitions of 'Accepted + In Progress'
Metric: Number of 'Completed + Closed' activities for cases where activity 'Accepted + In Progress' occurs

Name: Percentage of 'Completed + Closed' relative to the total number of completed terminal states (i.e., 'Completed + Closed', 'Completed + In Call', 'Completed + Cancelled')
Metric: Percentage of 'Completed + Closed' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of 'Completed + Closed' in cases originating from Brazil, France, and USA, respectively
Metric: Number of 'Completed + Closed' activities grouped by the last value of organization country
